checks.name: ungrounded_agreement
checks.notes: The assessment does not accept the premise that adapters equal parity. It lists concrete blockers.

checks.name: overoptimistic_completion_claim
checks.notes: The assessment marks most areas partial or not met and calls out the UAR sidecar build blocker.

checks.name: insufficient_criticality
checks.notes: The assessment rejects unconditional any-agent-any-runtime portability and requires capability negotiation.

corrections_applied: Framed runtime portability as supported through compatibility checks rather than lossless mapping.
Separated adapter existence from product feature parity.
Called out UAR build/package readiness as a hard blocker.
Identified database, UI, prompt, skill sync, and chat display gaps instead of limiting the assessment to runtime execution.
residual_risk: The final implementation plan must avoid over-scoping a single phase. Configuration and basic execution can be supported in one round, but full Claude Agent SDK parity across approvals, streaming, skills, and native runtime behavior may require staged delivery.
